text: I just noticed some blood in my underwear.
guideline_rule: Bleeding from the vagina is a danger sign during pregnancy.

text: I have started bleeding heavily from my vagina.
guideline_rule: Bleeding from the vagina is a danger sign during pregnancy.

text: There is red blood coming out of me this morning.
guideline_rule: Bleeding from the vagina is a danger sign during pregnancy.

text: My baby has not moved at all today.
guideline_rule: Absence of fetal movements is a danger sign during pregnancy.

text: I am worried because I have not felt any kicks since yesterday.
guideline_rule: Absence of fetal movements is a danger sign during pregnancy.

text: The baby stopped moving completely in my belly.
guideline_rule: Absence of fetal movements is a danger sign during pregnancy.

text: I have a pounding headache that will not go away.
guideline_rule: Severe headache or blurred vision is a danger sign. It may indicate severe pre-eclampsia.

text: My vision is getting really blurry and I see flashing lights.
guideline_rule: Severe headache or blurred vision is a danger sign. It may indicate severe pre-eclampsia.

text: My head hurts severely and my eyes are failing to focus.
guideline_rule: Severe headache or blurred vision is a danger sign. It may indicate severe pre-eclampsia.

symptom_name: Swelling of feet, hands, or face
text: My rings will not fit because my hands are completely swollen.
guideline_rule: Swelling of feet, hands, or face is a danger sign during pregnancy.

symptom_name: Swelling of feet, hands, or face
text: My face looks puffed up and my hands are very tight.
guideline_rule: Swelling of feet, hands, or face is a danger sign during pregnancy.

symptom_name: Swelling of feet, hands, or face
text: My hands and face became suddenly very swollen today.
guideline_rule: Swelling of feet, hands, or face is a danger sign during pregnancy.

text: It burns when I urinate and I feel a bit hot.
guideline_rule: Fever plus frequent urination, painful urination and urgency may indicate a Urinary Tract Infection.

text: I have a mild fever and I need to urinate constantly, which hurts.
guideline_rule: Fever plus frequent urination, painful urination and urgency may indicate a Urinary Tract Infection.

text: Peeing is really painful and I think I am running a temperature.
guideline_rule: Fever plus frequent urination, painful urination and urgency may indicate a Urinary Tract Infection.

text: I throw up every morning when I wake up.
guideline_rule: Nausea or vomiting most commonly occurs during the 1st trimester due to hormonal effect on the upper GI tract.

text: I have been feeling sick to my stomach lately.
guideline_rule: Nausea or vomiting most commonly occurs during the 1st trimester due to hormonal effect on the upper GI tract.

text: Certain food smells make me extremely nauseous.
guideline_rule: Nausea or vomiting most commonly occurs during the 1st trimester due to hormonal effect on the upper GI tract.

text: I am just so tired all the time.
guideline_rule: Fatigue or sleeplessness most commonly occurs during the 1st trimester due to decreased metabolism.

text: I cannot seem to get enough sleep no matter what.
guideline_rule: Fatigue or sleeplessness most commonly occurs during the 1st trimester due to decreased metabolism.

text: I feel completely exhausted halfway through the day.
guideline_rule: Fatigue or sleeplessness most commonly occurs during the 1st trimester due to decreased metabolism.

text: I get these sharp pulling pains on the sides of my stomach.
guideline_rule: Abdominal and groin pain, twinges, or pulling sensations most commonly occur during 2nd-3rd trimester as enlarging uterus stretches ligaments.

text: My groin aches a little bit when I stand up.
guideline_rule: Abdominal and groin pain, twinges, or pulling sensations most commonly occur during 2nd-3rd trimester as enlarging uterus stretches ligaments.

text: I feel sudden twinges in my lower belly when I stretch.
guideline_rule: Abdominal and groin pain, twinges, or pulling sensations most commonly occur during 2nd-3rd trimester as enlarging uterus stretches ligaments.

text: I feel completely fine and healthy today.
guideline_rule: Routine check-in with no warning signs or danger signs reported. Maintain scheduled antenatal care visits.

text: I don't have any pain or bleeding, everything is fine.
guideline_rule: Routine check-in with no warning signs or danger signs reported. Maintain scheduled antenatal care visits.

text: Everything is going well with my pregnancy and I have no complaints.
guideline_rule: Routine check-in with no warning signs or danger signs reported. Maintain scheduled antenatal care visits.

text: I am fine no issues.
guideline_rule: Routine check-in with no warning signs or danger signs reported. Maintain scheduled antenatal care visits.
